data.name: ShadowVerse
data.description: Agentic AI that turns real user session recordings into demographic digital twins, fine-tuned with Mistral, that autonomously test web apps the way real users would. Built at the Mistral AI hackathon.

data.name: hpml-final-project
data.description: Multi-modal agent inference optimization on IBM AssetOpsBench. Added a vision inspection agent and applied AWQ INT4 quantization to the Qwen2.5-VL and Llama 3 LLaVA VLMs for about 2x lower latency and far less GPU memory.

data.name: pramana-care-ai
data.description: An agentic data-quality engine for Indian healthcare. It scores a 10,000-row facility dataset against contradiction rules and runs a LangGraph agent over Databricks and Mosaic AI Vector Search to answer planner questions with row-level citations. Built for the Hack-Nation Global AI Hackathon.

data.name: agentic-music-recommender
data.description: SoundScout AI, an agentic RAG music recommender over 114K Spotify tracks. A LangGraph agent retrieves candidates, detects and corrects popularity and genre bias, and self-critiques its picks with confidence scoring.

data.name: ai-news-analysis-raise-hackathon2026
data.description: RAISE 2026 hackathon project analyzing how AI is framed in news headlines. It enriches headlines with sentiment, emotion and topic clusters, and adds a custom AI-Phobia score (a fear lexicon plus a transformer emotion classifier) to catch alarmist framing that plain sentiment misses.

data.name: dl4cv-final-project
data.description: A computer vision pipeline that maps retail shelves. It detects products with RT-DETR and YOLO, classifies them with CLIP visual anchors, and builds a spatial and semantic scene graph of product placement, like Coke next to Pepsi. Final project for Columbia Deep Learning for Computer Vision (COMS 4995).

data.name: active-clinical-guardian-devfest26
data.description: The Active Clinical Guardian, a real-time clinical safety monitor built at Columbia DevFest 2026. It listens to doctor-patient encounters, checks drug safety with AI reasoning, and interrupts by voice when it detects a dangerous interaction.

data.name: mistral-nemo-finetuning
data.description: Fine-tuning the Mistral NeMo language model.

data.name: llms-related
data.description: A collection of experiments and notebooks on large language models.

data.name: ml-dl-related
data.description: Machine learning and deep learning experiments and notebooks.

data.name: databricks-related
data.description: Databricks notebooks and data engineering experiments.

data.name: neo4j-related
data.description: Neo4j graph database experiments and notebooks.

data.name: opencv-programs
data.description: A set of OpenCV computer vision programs in Python.

data.name: Stock-Prediction-Web-App
data.description: A stock prediction web app built with fbprophet.

data.name: Spotify-Match
data.description: Spotify Match, a web app from CSE 115A.
